notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers hits a grand slam (7) to left center field. Willy Adames scores. Luis Arraez scores. Casey Schmitt scores.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.

notableEvents.label: Will Brennan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Brennan lines out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Chase Meidroth.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds out, third baseman Colson Montgomery to first baseman Miguel Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Will Brennan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Brennan singles on a fly ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Harrison Bader to 3rd.
